switching_cost_analysis: Switching costs are LOW for traders — positions can be closed and capital moved to Hyperliquid or GMX within minutes with no lock-up, and the dYdX v4 Cosmos app-chain migration actually increased friction for integrators (new SDK, new wallet flows) rather than reducing it.
rationale: dYdX pioneered on-chain perpetuals and retains brand recognition and a battle-tested order-book model, but its competitive moat has materially eroded: Hyperliquid now commands the majority of perp DEX volume with a faster, cheaper UX, while GMX dominates TVL-weighted mindshare on EVM chains. The v4 migration to a sovereign Cosmos chain removed Ethereum composability advantages and introduced new execution-layer risks, and the DYDX token's staking/governance utility has not translated into strong fee-capture or retention mechanics. Regulatory risk is relatively higher because dYdX Trading Inc. already settled with the CFTC (2023, $100k fine) and the US-person geo-block history draws continued scrutiny compared to fully decentralised competitors like GMX.

_data_quality_notes.market_cap: Sourced from CoinGecko spot prices ~2025-07-10; figures rounded to nearest $5M.
_data_quality_notes.dau: NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER for most competitors with precision; estimates derived from DefiLlama unique-address proxies and public Dune dashboards referenced in project docs — treat as indicative ±40%.
_data_quality_notes.revenue_30d: DefiLlama 'Fees & Revenue' module used where available; Hyperliquid and GMX figures are protocol fees to treasury/LPs, not annualised. dYdX revenue reflects trading-fee accrual to the community treasury.
_data_quality_notes.dev_ecosystem: Electric Capital 2024 Developer Report free summary does not break out dYdX specifically at sub-protocol level; monthly_active_devs and full_time_devs are estimates from GitHub commit activity on github.com/dydxprotocol (public repos) cross-referenced with EC report 'mid-size protocol' band. repos_building_on and integrations_count from dydx.exchange/ecosystem page.
_data_quality_notes.market_share: Volume-based share is approximate; Hyperliquid does not report to DefiLlama volume aggregator consistently, so true perp DEX market share for dYdX is likely lower than shown.
